name: @radzor/notification-hub
description: Fan-out notifications to multiple channels including email (SMTP/SendGrid), SMS (Twilio), push (FCM), and Slack webhooks. Register channels dynamically and track delivery status.

inputs.name: defaultChannels
inputs.description: Default channel names to send to when none specified (e.g. ["email", "slack"]).

inputs.name: retryAttempts
inputs.description: Number of retry attempts on delivery failure (default: 2).

outputs.name: deliveryReport
outputs.type: { channelName: string; success: boolean; messageId: string; error?: string }

events.name: onDelivered
events.description: Fired when a notification is successfully delivered to a channel.

events.name: onFailed
events.description: Fired when delivery fails after all retry attempts.

actions.name: send

params.name: recipient
params.description: Recipient identifier (email, phone, device token, or channel ID depending on channel type).

params.name: channels
params.description: Channel names to send to. Uses defaultChannels if omitted.

params.name: metadata
params.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata passed to channel handlers.

actions.returns: Promise<{ results: Array<{ channel: string; success: boolean; messageId?: string; error?: string }> }>
actions.description: Send a notification to one or more channels.

actions.name: registerChannel
actions.description: Register a notification channel with its transport configuration.

actions.name: removeChannel
actions.description: Remove a registered channel. Returns true if it existed.

llm.constraints: Each channel type requires its own credentials in the config parameter: email needs SMTP host/port/user/pass or SendGrid API key; sms needs Twilio SID/token/from; push needs FCM server key; slack needs webhook URL. No external dependencies — all transports use raw fetch.
